mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inner_tbl.*, ROWNUM rn FROM ( SELECT BOARD_NO, REFNO, TITLE, CONTENT, READCNT, TO_CHAR(REGDTE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGDTE, BOARD_TYPE, FILEPATH, FNAME, WRITER_ID, LEVEL - 1 AS DEPTH FROM FFG_BOARD2 WHERE BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType} START WITH REFNO = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR BOARD_NO = REFNO ORDER SIBLINGS BY BOARD_NO DESC ) inner_tbl WHERE inner_tbl.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT BOARD_NO, TITLE FROM FFG_BOARD2 WHERE BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType} START WITH REFNO = 0 CONNECT BY PRIOR BOARD_NO = REFNO ) WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FFG_BOARD2 ( BOARD_NO, REFNO, TITLE, CONTENT, READCNT, REGDTE, UPDATE_DATE, BOARD_TYPE, FILEPATH, FNAME, WRITER_ID ) VALUES ( NVL((SELECT MAX(BOARD_NO) + 1 FROM FFG_BOARD2), 1), #{refno}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{boardType}, #{filepath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writerId} )
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO, REFNO, TITLE, CONTENT, READCNT, TO_CHAR(REGDTE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGDTE, BOARD_TYPE, FILEPATH, FNAME, WRITER_ID, 0 AS DEPTH FROM FFG_BOARD2 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE FFG_BOARD2 SET TITLE = #{request.title}, CONTENT = #{request.content}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, FILEPATH = #{request.filepath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FNAME = #{request.fname, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
